MdTestData.MdString: 1. Ordered item 1 2. Ordered item 2 1. Nested ordered item 2.1 2. Nested ordered item 2.2 3. Ordered item 3
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified:
1. Ordered item 1
  2. Ordered item 2
    1. Nested ordered item 2.1
    2. Nested ordered item 2.2
  3. Ordered item 3
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString: 1. Ordered item 1 2. Ordered item 2 1. Nested ordered item 2.1 2. Nested ordered item 2.2 3. Ordered item 3

MdTestData.MdString:
1. this 2. is 3. a - nested 4. list
1. First ordered item - Subitem A - Subitem B 2. Second ordered item
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified:
1. this
  2. is
  3. a
    • nested
  4. list
  1. First ordered item
    • Subitem A
    • Subitem B
  2. Second ordered item
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
1. this 2. is 3. a - nested 4. list
1. First ordered item - Subitem A - Subitem B 2. Second ordered item

MdTestData.MdString:
1. list item
1. list item 2. list item
1. list item 2. list item 3. list item
1. list item 2. list item 3. list item 4. list item
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified:
1. list item
  1. list item
  2. list item
  1. list item
  2. list item
  3. list item
  1. list item
  2. list item
  3. list item
  4. list item
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
1. list item
1. list item 2. list item
1. list item 2. list item 3. list item
1. list item 2. list item 3. list item 4. list item

MdTestData.MdString: 1. Extra spaces for alignment - This is a sublist 2. Another item
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified:
1. Extra spaces for alignment
    • This is a sublist
  2. Another item
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString: 1. Extra spaces for alignment - This is a sublist 2. Another item

MdTestData.MdString:
# Should be a Paragrah 1. [ ] a task something
# Should be List SubContent 1. [ ] a task something
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified:
Should be a Paragrah

  1. a task

something

Should be List SubContent

  1. a task

    something
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
# Should be a Paragrah 1. [ ] a task something
# Should be List SubContent 1. [ ] a task something

MdTestData.DeveloperNote: This is an older test that was once related to lists

MdTestData.MdString:
1. list item
2. list item 1. list item
6. list item 4. list item 8. list item
8798. list item 13621. list item 546544564. list item 114. list item
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified:
1. list item
  1. list item
  2. list item
  1. list item
  2. list item
  3. list item
  1. list item
  2. list item
  3. list item
  4. list item
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
1. list item
2. list item 1. list item
6. list item 4. list item 8. list item
8798. list item 13621. list item 546544564. list item 114. list item

MdTestData.MdString: 1. Top-level item 1. Subitem level 1 1. Subitem level 2 1. Subitem level 3
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString: 1. Top-level item 1. Subitem level 1 1. Subitem level 2 1. Subitem level 3

MdTestData.MdString:
1. [ ] tasklist
1. [x] tasklist
1. [X] tasklist
1.[ ] tasklist
1.[x] tasklist
1.[X] tasklist
1. [ ] tasklist
1. [x] tasklist
1. [X] tasklist
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified:
1. tasklist
  1. tasklist
  1. tasklist
  1. tasklist
  1. tasklist
  1. tasklist
  1. tasklist
  1. tasklist
  1. tasklist
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
1. [ ] tasklist
1. [x] tasklist
1. [X] tasklist
1.[ ] tasklist
1.[x] tasklist
1.[X] tasklist
1. [ ] tasklist
1. [x] tasklist
1. [X] tasklist

MdTestData.MdString: 1. this 2. [ ] is 3. [x] a - [X] nested 4. todo list
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified:
1. this
  2. is
  3. a
    • nested
  4. todo list
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString: 1. this 2. [ ] is 3. [x] a - [X] nested 4. todo list

MdTestData.MdString: 1. Ordered task list 2. [ ] Incomplete task in ordered list 3. [x] Completed task in ordered list
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified:
1. Ordered task list
  2. Incomplete task in ordered list
  3. Completed task in ordered list
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString: 1. Ordered task list 2. [ ] Incomplete task in ordered list 3. [x] Completed task in ordered list

MdTestData.MdString: 1. A list item with **bold text** 2. A list item with *italic text* 3. A list item with `inline code`
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified:
1. A list item with bold text
  2. A list item with italic text
  3. A list item with inline code
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString: 1. A list item with **bold text** 2. A list item with *italic text* 3. A list item with `inline code`
